message:
test(hostcall_io_uring_lane,hostcall_rewrite): add 11 tests for public API coverage gaps

io_uring_lane: +8 tests covering HostcallDispatchLane::as_str,
HostcallIoHint::is_io_heavy, conservative() config defaults,
allow_for_capability matrix, IoUringLaneDecision constructors,
full capability alias mapping, fallback reason codes, serde roundtrip.
Total: 13→21 tests.

hostcall_rewrite: +3 tests covering from_env smoke test and
from_opt parsing logic (disabled/enabled values). Linter extracted
from_opt() helper for testability. Total: 10→13 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
